name: Rhubarb Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the shortening and 1 1/2 cups of sugar until smooth.
2. Beat in the egg.
3. Mix the buttermilk with the baking soda and add it to the sugar mixture alternately with flour, beginning and ending with flour. Stir until just combined.
4. Fold in diced rhubarb, vanilla, and cinnamon.
5. Pour the batter into a greased and floured 2-quart baking dish.
6. Sprinkle the remaining sugar mixed with cinnamon evenly over the top.
7. Bake at 350°F for 40 to 45 minutes.
